name: OpenGolfAPI
fields: course name; GPS coordinates; scorecards; tee data; contact info; metadata
current_status: Candidate baseline for US A/B test
risk_notes: ODbL obligations; limited Europe/global coverage; deduplication required

name: OpenStreetMap
update_method: Overpass API; Geofabrik/planet extracts; community OSM edits
fields: name; geometry; coordinates; address tags; website/contact tags; OSM IDs; leisure=golf_course tags
risk_notes: Sparse scorecard data; inconsistent tags; ODbL database obligations

name: OSM-derived golf extracts
license_or_terms: Usually ODbL if OSM-derived; confirm per project
update_method: Generate from OSM extracts; refresh periodically
fields: OSM ID; name; geometry; country; region; tags; centroid/bbox
risk_notes: Staleness; inherited ODbL obligations; prefer reproducible internal scripts

name: Open Course Data Model
license_or_terms: Open standard; exact license/version to verify
update_method: Adopt/transform schema; track version in ADR
fields: course; hole; tee set; par; yardage; hazards; metadata
risk_notes: Not a data source; license/version review required; avoid overfitting MVP

name: GolfCourse API
fields: course lookup; location; details depending on docs/tier
risk_notes: Free API is not open data; do not import until redistribution terms are clear

name: GolfAPI.io
fields: clubs; courses; pars; stroke indexes; tee data; lengths; slope/course ratings; coordinates/POIs
risk_notes: Likely incompatible with open dataset; vendor lock-in; needs explicit rights

name: iGolf
fields: directory data; GPS/layout data; facility metadata; structured records
risk_notes: Strong coverage but likely not open; keep separate unless terms allow publication

name: National golf federations and club directories
update_method: Manual research; permission requests; formal partnership
fields: club/course names; addresses; websites; contacts; federation status; ratings sometimes
risk_notes: Scraping/copyright risk; not automated MVP import without permission

name: Municipal/open government portals
fields: facility name; address; geometry; ownership/operator; amenities
risk_notes: Fragmented coverage; limited scorecard data; license review per source

name: Direct club/community submissions
update_method: In-app proposals; moderation; club verification; Nostr provenance
fields: course profile; holes; tee sets; par; yardage/meters; local rules; ratings; evidence links
risk_notes: Needs anti-spam; contributor license terms; rollback/history; proof requirements
